name: Hei Seele Vollerei
description: Hei Seele is a being awakened inside Seele Vollerei, originally referred to by the latter as "the other me". She originates from the stigma on Seele's chest, giving her greater control over the stigma's power. Hei Seele vowed to protect Seele, the meaning of her existence, from all harm that should come her way. name: Ikumatsu Nishiki
description: Owner of a ramen restaurant. She had a deep grudge against Joi participants, as her husband was killed by terrorism. Katsura worked at her restaurant when he was injured and hid from the Shinsengumi. He repaid her favour by helping her during a crisis. Although she now knows his identity as a Joi participant, they are on friendly terms. Katsura's subsequent television interview was carried out at her restaurant. She eventually grew tired of living in horrible conditions and was able to work her way into the home of a wealthy woman who was aware of Jeanne's noble family. name: Koopa
description: Bowser is Mario's archnemesis. He is the leader and most powerful of the turtle-like Koopa race. Although Bowser has joined forces with Mario in a few games, he is considered a "bad guy" due to his ambition to kidnap and dethrone Princess Peach and conquer the Mushroom Kingdom. Though their origins are unknown, Bowser has eight children; the seven Koopalings and Bowser Jr. Bowser, or King Koopa, is perhaps most famous for his repeated kidnappings of Princess Peach.
